description: Horizons Patch 4 (18 December 2024) — Changes, Combat Balance Changes (Bows, Cursed Staffs, Holy Staffs, Maces, Nature Staffs, Quarterstaffs, War Gloves, Armors, Shoes, Mounts, Potions), Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes
items: Dropped banners no longer reduce Fortification protection
[Mobile] Stack and Sort buttons have been restored to the main Inventory menu
sections.searchable_text: Changes Dropped banners Fortification protection Mobile Stack Sort Inventory

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Bows Demon Arrow Wailing Bow Cursed Staffs Dark Matter Holy Staffs Sanctify Exalted Staff Maces Eye of the Storm Dreadstorm Monarch Vendetta Camlann Mace Nature Staffs Soul Link Ironroot Staff Quarterstaffs Phantom Twin Phantom Twinblade Separator War Gloves Earth Crusher Ravenstrike Cestus Armors Requite Armor of Valor Shoes Delayed Teleport Mage Sandals Mounts Raven Scream Morgana Raven Reactive Scream removed Potions Fish Bait

changes.raw_text: Demon Arrow: Damage to 1st target: 189 (unchanged); 2nd target: 236 → 256; 3rd target: 283 → 323; 4th or more targets: 331 → 391

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Dark Matter Cooldown 20s 15s Energy cost 10 16

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Sanctify Exalted Staff Healing 122 138 Range 10m 12m

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Eye of the Storm Dreadstorm Monarch 1st 2nd cast 39 50 Resistance reduction 0.12 0.15 Vendetta Camlann Mace Cast time 0.7s 0.25s Stand time 0.7s 0.2s

changes.raw_text: Eye of the Storm: 1st & 2nd cast damage: 39 → 50; Resistance reduction: 0.12 → 0.15

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Soul Link Ironroot Staff Ally Ally healing transfer 50% 75% 2nd cast stand time 1s 0s

changes.raw_text: Soul Link: Ally/Ally healing transfer percentage: 50% → 75%; 2nd cast stand time: 1s → 0s

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Phantom Twin Phantom Twinblade Damage per tick 36 41 Slow 10% 15% Energy costs 5 5 7 Separator target damage 125 157

changes.raw_text: Phantom Twin: Damage per tick: 36 → 41; Slow: 10% → 15%; Added missing energy costs: 5/5/7

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Earth Crusher Ravenstrike Cestus Self-slow 25% 40% 0 charge 175 155 1 185 165 2 195 175 3 205 185

changes.raw_text: Earth Crusher: Self-slow: 25% → 40%; 0 charge: 175 → 155; 1 charge: 185 → 165; 2 charge: 195 → 175; 3 charge: 205 → 185

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Requite Armor of Valor Damage 46 31

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Delayed Teleport Mage Sandals resistances 0.2 2s landing no exact position VFX enemies

changes.raw_text: Delayed Teleport: Now increases resistances by 0.2 for 2s after landing. No longer shows the exact ending position VFX to enemies.
notes: Now increases resistances by 0.2 for 2s after landing
No longer shows the exact ending position VFX to enemies

subsections.heading: Mounts
subsections.searchable_text: Mounts Raven Scream Morgana Raven consecutive fear immunity 15s no longer inherits rider CC duration Reactive Scream removed

changes.raw_text: Raven Scream: Now gives feared targets immunity to consecutive Raven fears for 15s. No longer inherits the rider's bonus CC duration.
notes: Now gives feared targets immunity to consecutive Raven fears for 15s
No longer inherits the rider's bonus CC duration

subsections.heading: Potions
subsections.searchable_text: Potions Fish Bait consumable inventory no longer potion slot

changes.raw_text: Fish Bait is now consumable from inventory, rather than as a potion. If equipped in the potion slot prior to this patch, it must be removed before it can be used from the inventory.
notes: Fish Bait is now consumable from inventory, rather than as a potion
If previously equipped in the potion slot, it must be removed before use from inventory

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Vengeful Sprint (Demon Boots): Fixed issue where the active charge count VFX did not display correctly
Hellfire Potion: Fixed issue where it reduced healing cast instead of healing received
Fixed issue where certain items would have a lower salvage value than intended
Fixed issue where non-salvageable items would display a salvage value
Fixed issue where Keeper Bear and Giant mobs could knock players out of combat range, causing them to reset
Fixed issue where the Morgana Fang boss would stand still while casting Splitting Claw

Multiple Albion Journal fixes: animal offspring progress, Weakened Wisp in Greater Mists, Caerleon luxury goods, T7 Mount pig, island type, player kill assists, horse offspring, Guild Challenge Level 100 → 99
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Vengeful Sprint VFX charge count Hellfire Potion healing cast received salvage value non-salvageable Keeper Bear Giant mobs combat range reset Morgana Fang Splitting Claw Journal animal offspring Weakened Wisp Greater Mists Caerleon luxury goods T7 Mount pig island type kill assists horse offspring Guild Challenge Level 99 graphical animation terrain audio localization
